creator: ports@mcdermottroe.com
text:
I don't have the ability to maintain this port any more since I don't
have any FreeBSD machines to hand to do any sort of detailed testing.

The patch looks good though, and is much appreciated.

If anyone feels like taking over maintainership of this I'd be more than
happy to relinquish it.

Thanks,

-C

On Tue, Oct 01, 2013 at 03:50:09AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/pecl-xhprof,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/182532 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182532
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
